description_long: This is a single-bladed axe with a metallic handle and an ornate, gold-toned blade. The blade features intricate decorative engravings and a unique double-pointed top, giving it a stylized, almost ceremonial appearance. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of steel or iron, with a slightly weathered texture. The blade is broad and crescent-shaped, with a pronounced curve and a flat poll opposite the cutting edge. The mounting of the blade to the handle is robust, with a visible collar or socket securing the blade. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and decorative craftsmanship, suitable for display or ceremonial use in an urban context.
description: A decorative, gold-toned axe with an engraved crescent blade and a straight metallic handle, featuring a unique double-pointed top.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from a side angle, highlighting the ornate engravings on the crescent blade and the straight, metallic handle.
description_view_1: A front-on view, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the double-pointed top, with minimal detail visible on the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, again displaying the engraved blade and the full length of the metallic handle.
description_view_3: A top-down view, emphasizing the straightness and cylindrical shape of the handle, with the blade's width visible at the end.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical metallic handle, likely steel, with a smooth surface and no visible grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Crescent-shaped, single-edged blade with ornate engravings and a double-pointed top; flat poll opposite the edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional socket mounting with visible collar securing the blade to the handle.
